title: Add interruption and resume regression coverage for transaction checkpoints
goal: Add regression coverage proving that the redesigned protocol survives interruption and resumes correctly across the checkpoint-sensitive paths described in plan.md.
scope: Add tests for interrupted in-progress transactions.
Add tests for interrupted verify flows.
Add tests for interrupted commit flows.
Add tests for interrupted post-commit pre-terminal flows.
Add tests for structural no-active representation and terminal materialization behavior.
Add tests for compatibility-sensitive replay paths described in plan.md.
out_of_scope: Operator documentation updates that belong to p3-t03.
Changing canonical semantics beyond implementing plan.md.
expected_outputs: Interruption-focused regression coverage for transaction checkpoints.
Evidence that no-active and post-terminal materialization remain structurally explicit under repeated resume.
A test-to-plan traceability summary for interruption scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Interruption cases resume deterministically under the documented resume model.
Terminal transactions are not resumed as active work.
No-active materialized-state behavior remains structurally explicit and stable under repeated resume.
Compatibility-sensitive replay cases behave within the documented policy.
